stemHtml: What can a pilot do to avoid Ice Crystal Icing?

options.a: Avoid CB on the upwind side and stay above the tropopause.
options.b: Avoid CB on the upwind side and stay below the tropopause.
options.c: Avoid CB on the downwind side and stay above the tropopause.
options.d: Avoid CB on the downwind side and stay below the tropopause.
